# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for application logs and backups"
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "application-logs",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for application logs"
      }
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "backups",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for backups"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountName": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": false,
        "allowCrossTenantReplication": false,
        "defaultToOAuthAuthentication": true,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Disabled",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "encryption": {
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage",
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        },
        "isVersioningEnabled": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('logsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "application-logs",
          "managedBy": "logging-infrastructure"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('backupsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "immutableStorageWithVersioning": {
          "enabled": true
        },
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "backups",
          "managedBy": "logging-infrastructure"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/storageAccountDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "Transaction",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/Microsoft.Insights/blobDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "StorageRead",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageWrite",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageDelete",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "Transaction",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "blobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('logsContainerName')]"
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('backupsContainerName')]"
    }
  }
}
